coach_notes: Classroom management and lesson planning are the most critical gaps because they are foundational skills for any education role, directly impacting your ability to create a structured learning environment and deliver effective instruction. Without these, your experience in algebra and assessments may not translate into a classroom setting. To address this, take a free online course on classroom management strategies and practice writing lesson plans for your subject areas.

jobs.title: ASC Math Tutor
jobs.label: ready

jobs.gaps: No specific college-level math tutoring experience mentioned; may need to demonstrate ability to tutor at the college level.

jobs.title: Part-Time Lecturer - Mathematics (Boston)

jobs.gaps: Requires a master's degree or higher in mathematics or related field; your resume does not indicate advanced degree or university-level teaching experience.
